title: Open Studios: Christmas 2022
summary: This weekend I’m taking part in Christmas Open Studios at Krowji in Redruth. FRI 2nd Dec, 5pm–9pm SAT 3rd Dec, 10am–4pm SUN 4th Dec, 10am–4pm See you there!? You’ll be able to buy my art and play my games. More info: www.krowji.org.uk/open-studios/
content:
This weekend I’m taking part in Christmas Open Studios at Krowji in Redruth.

  • FRI 2nd Dec, 5pm–9pm
  • SAT 3rd Dec, 10am–4pm
  • SUN 4th Dec, 10am–4pm

See you there!?

You’ll be able to buy my art and play my games.

More info: www.krowji.org.uk/open-studios/
